summary: Trading Hours Compliance feature fully tested - All 11 backend tests pass. API endpoints return correct trading_hours data. UI displays compliance in Risk Limits tab with Day Trading row, Late Trade alerts, and Action Items.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all trading hours compliance UI elements verified)

seed_data_creation: None required - using existing demo strategies with trade data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trading Hours Compliance feature is complete. The API /api/admin/risk-engine/strategy-analysis/{account} returns trading_hours data with overnight_positions_found, late_trades_found, force_flat_time, status, and penalty_applied fields. The UI displays this in the Risk Limits tab under 'Detailed Compliance Breakdown' table with Day Trading row showing 21:50 UTC force flat time. Late trades are shown as WARNING alerts in Active Risk Alerts section.
features_verified: API endpoint /api/admin/risk-engine/strategy-analysis/{account} returns trading_hours compliance data
API endpoint returns overnight_positions_found, late_trades_found, force_flat_time, status, penalty_applied
API endpoint /api/admin/risk-engine/policy returns force_flat_time and leverage settings
Risk Limits tab shows Day Trading Compliance row with 21:50 UTC (16:50 NY) force flat time
Risk Limits tab shows Breaches count (0 overnight, 4 late) with COMPLIANT status
Active Risk Alerts show LATE TRADE warnings with timestamps
Action Items to Improve Score shows TRADING HOURS issue with fix recommendation
Trade Duration Analysis displayed with metrics
Demo Analytics page loads with all charts and KPIs
